2026-04-23T02:19:39.2638197Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T02:19:39.2638730Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T02:19:39.2639164Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T02:19:39.2639549Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T02:19:39.2639881Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m

2026-04-23T02:23:53.5008346Z      
2026-04-23T02:23:53.5009981Z   3. **Naming conventions**: I'm checking `VmFamily` for potential issues with naming patterns like `_N` suffixes, and I notice `GuestSubscriptionsOperations.delete` uses a reserved JavaScript keyword - though this appears to be a pre-existing issue rather than something introduced by this PR.

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 comment(s) can be added. Target: 38253.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"The comment text in Markdown format. This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Supports advanced search syntax for precise filtering.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort repositories by field, defaults to best match","enum":["stars","forks","help-wanted-issues","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_repositories"}]}}}
